description: |-

---

# azion_crls (Data Source)

Provides a data source to list all certificate revocation lists (CRL) owned by your account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all certificate revocation lists
data "azion_crls" "example" {}

# Output the first CRL name
output "first_crl_name" {
  value = data.azion_crls.example.results[0].name
}

# Output the total count
output "total_crls" {
  value = data.azion_crls.example.counter
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `counter` (Number) The total number of certificate revocation lists.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the data source.
- `links` (Attributes) Pagination links. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--links))
- `page` (Number) The current page number.
- `page_size` (Number) The number of items per page.
- `results` (Attributes List) List of certificate revocation lists. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))
- `schema_version` (Number) Schema Version.
- `total_pages` (Number) The total number of pages.

<a id="nestedatt--links"></a>
### Nested Schema for `links`

Read-Only:

- `next` (String) URL to the next page of results.
- `previous` (String) URL to the previous page of results.

<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Indicates if the certificate revocation list is active.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp of the certificate revocation list creation on the platform.
- `crl` (String) The certificate revocation list content.
- `id` (Number) Identifier of the certificate revocation list.
- `issuer` (String) Issuer of the certificate revocation list.
- `last_editor` (String) Last editor of the certificate revocation list.
- `last_modified` (String) Timestamp of the last modification made to the certificate content on the platform.
- `last_update` (String) Timestamp of the last update issued by the certification revocation list issuer.
- `name` (String) Name of the certificate revocation list.
- `next_update` (String) Timestamp of the next scheduled update from the certification revocation list issuer.
- `product_version` (String) Product version of the certificate revocation list.
